scores.notes: Company name OCR has minor errors ('BOOK TALK' vs 'BOOK TA .K'); address mostly correct but missing some punctuation spacing; date matches exactly; total amount correct. Table structure is approximate but not explicitly preserved as a table, more like a list. Layout order is mostly correct but extra unrelated text and cashier info present. Overall, most ground truth text is captured but with some formatting and minor text inaccuracies.
